brand_logo_note: Logo written lowercase: 'hippo float' — the second 'o' in 'hippo' has a distinctive wave/line through it

anchor_system.name: 2-in-1 Carry Bag & Anchor
anchor_system.description: Every Hippo Float product includes a waterproof dry bag that doubles as an anchor when filled with water or sand underwater

components.dry_bag: Waterproof bag — matches float color (or green for CHILL). Serves as anchor weight underwater
components.rope: Royal blue twisted nylon rope connecting float to anchor bag
components.buoy: Small bright yellow sphere marker — floats at water surface level on the rope
components.carabiner: Metal clip for secure attachment between rope and float/bag

anchor_system.mechanics: Rope runs: float → down through water → yellow buoy (at surface) → continues down → anchor bag (fully submerged underwater)
strict_rules: Anchor bag ALWAYS appears UNDERWATER — never above water surface
Yellow buoy ALWAYS visible at or near water surface on the rope
Blue rope ALWAYS visibly connecting float to anchor system
Rope must appear taut or naturally slack but ALWAYS CONNECTED
Anchor bag must show 'hippo' logo text
Never show anchor bag floating on surface
Never show rope disconnected from float or bag
Never remove yellow buoy from composition
Carabiner clips visible at connection points

JOY.shape: Luxury recliner / lounger — reclined backrest with elevated headrest, ergonomic pool chair shape, semi-reclined at approximately 30-40 degree angle
JOY.shape_description: Like a premium inflatable pool chair/chaise lounge. Has a distinct backrest that reclines, giving it an L-shape or chaise lounge profile when viewed from the side

CHILL.shape: U-shaped horseshoe ring float — you sit IN the center hole with legs dangling through, arms resting on the ring sides
CHILL.shape_description: Like a life preserver ring but U-shaped/open at front. Has a mesh or fabric sling/seat in the center where you sit. The ring wraps around your back and sides while you face outward
taglines: Designed to Lounge. Built to Stay Put.
Float The Party. Lose The Drift.

FUN.shape: Large elongated cylindrical tube — like an oversized pool noodle but much thicker and with oval cross-section. Torpedo/log shaped
FUN.shape_description: A long oval-cylinder inflatable. You can straddle it like a log, lie across it, or hug it while floating. Think of a very large, thick pool noodle with oval cross-section
taglines: Float The Party. Lose The Drift.

VIBES.shape: Flat rectangular mat/raft with circular texture drainage holes across the top surface
VIBES.shape_description: A wide flat inflatable mat — like a premium pool lilo/air mattress but with distinctive circular holes/texture dots covering the entire top surface. Very flat and rectangular, you lie flat on top of it

universal_visual_rules.logo: 'hippo' text always visible on float surface in contrasting color (white on colored floats)
universal_visual_rules.logo_note: Do not alter the logo — the distinctive wave in the 'o' must be preserved
forbidden_changes: Do NOT change any float's shape or silhouette
Do NOT mix up shapes between product lines (JOY ≠ CHILL ≠ FUN ≠ VIBES)
Do NOT change rope color from blue
Do NOT change buoy color from yellow
Do NOT remove the anchor system when float is in water
Do NOT show anchor bag above water line
Do NOT invent accessories not on real product
Do NOT change product colors without authorization

photography_requirements.signature_shot: Half-underwater split shot — showing float on surface with people/person, and anchor bag visible below water line with rope and yellow buoy
environments: Luxury swimming pool (turquoise water, white/stone surrounds)
photography_requirements.models: Attractive diverse individuals and couples, beach-ready, relaxed and joyful
photography_requirements.lighting: Natural golden/bright sunlight, no dark or moody lighting
photography_requirements.mood: Fun luxury, social, aspirational, sun-soaked joy
